    Index

    A B C D F G I L M N S T V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    addVariable(SerialVariable) - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialArray
    Adds a SerialVariable to the SerialObject variable list.
    addVariable(SerialVariable) - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObject
    Adds a SerialVariable to the SerialObject variable list.
    apply(List) - Method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.Modification
    Modifies the SerialObject at the path given by Modification.getPath() in such a way that it is compatible with the latest version of the class.

    B

    BOOLEAN - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a boolean datatype.
    BYTE - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a byte datatype.

    C

    CHAR - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a char datatype.

    D

    deserialize(String, Version) - Static method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.Deserializer
    Returns the deserialized Object given a serialized String and relative Version.
    Deserializer - Class in me.apotterhead.cheers
    Deserializer is a utility class that houses all the logic necessary for deserialization of Strings provided by this library.
    DOUBLE - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a double datatype.

    F

    FLOAT - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a float datatype.

    G

    getBoolean() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a boolean.
    getByte() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a byte.
    getChar() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a char.
    getClassName() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObject
    Returns a String representing the class of the Object.
    getCurrentVersion() - Method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.Version
    Returns a String representing the most recent version of the class.
    getDouble() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a double.
    getFloat() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a float.
    getInt() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as an int.
    getLong() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a long.
    getModifications(String) - Method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.Version
    Returns a Modification array that represents what needs to happen to take Object from originalVersion to the result of Version.getCurrentVersion().
    getName() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObjectVariable
    Returns a String representation of the variable's name.
    getName() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns a String representation of the variable's name.
    getName() - Method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialVariable
    Returns a String representation of the variable's name.
    getPath() - Method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.Modification
    Deprecated.
    due to encouraging the inclusion of the path if necessary as a String in Modification.apply(List) and to discourage the use of this class in other instances.
    getRawValue() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns value as a String.
    getSerialObjectFromPath(List, String) - Static method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.Modification
    Returns the SerialObject from the List serialObjects that corresponds to the path given by path.
    getShort() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a short.
    getString() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns the value of the variable as a String.
    getType() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns a SerialPrimitiveType representing the datatype of the variable.
    getUUID() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObject
    Returns a String representing the unique ID of the Object.
    getUUID() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObjectVariable
    Returns a String representing the UUID of the Object that the variable is pointing at.
    getVariables() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObject
    Returns a SerialVariable List containg all the varaiables that have been added to this SerialObject.

    I

    INT - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with an int datatype.

    L

    LONG - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a long datatype.

    M

    me.apotterhead.cheers - module me.apotterhead.cheers
    Defines a serialization/deserialization library.
    me.apotterhead.cheers - package me.apotterhead.cheers
    Provides the classes containing the primary logic of the library.
    me.apotterhead.cheers.vars - package me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    Provides the classes that act as an intermediary between a java Object and the serialzied String.
    Modification - Interface in me.apotterhead.cheers
    Modification is an interface that represents a change in a class between versions.

    N

    NULL - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable whose value is null.

    S

    SerialArray - Class in me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    SerialObject is a class that extends SerialObject and represents an array being serialized.
    SerialArray(String, String) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialArray
    Constructs a new SerialArray with a String representing a unique ID (uuid), and a String representing a class.
    serialize(Object, Version) - Static method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.Serializer
    Returns a String representation of the provided Object.
    Serializer - Class in me.apotterhead.cheers
    Serializer is a utility class that houses all the logic necessary for the serialization of any java Object.
    SerialObject - Class in me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    SerialObject is a class that represents an Object that is being serialized.
    SerialObject(String, String) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObject
    Constructs a new SerialObject with a String representing a unique ID (uuid), and a String representing a class.
    SerialObjectVariable - Class in me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    SerialObjectVariable is a class that represents a variable that points to an Object.
    SerialObjectVariable(String, String) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObjectVariable
    Constructs a new SerialObjectVariable with the provided name and uuid.
    SerialPrimitive - Class in me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    SerialPrimitive is a class that represents a variable that is a primitive datatype.
    SerialPrimitive(String) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.NULL with the provided name and value of "null".
    SerialPrimitive(String, boolean) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.BOOLEAN with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, byte) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.BYTE with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, char) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.CHAR with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, double) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.DOUBLE with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, float) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.FLOAT with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, int) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.INT with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, long) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.LONG with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, short) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.SHORT with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, String) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive where type=SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType.STRING with the provided name and String representation of value.
    SerialPrimitive(String, String, SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType) - Constructor for class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Constructs a new SerialPrimitive with the provided name, value and type.
    SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType - Enum Class in me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    SerialPrimitiveType is an enum that represents the datatype of a primitive variable.
    SerialVariable - Interface in me.apotterhead.cheers.vars
    SerialVariable is an interface that represents a variable inside a SerialObject.
    SHORT - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a short datatype.
    STRING - Enum constant in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    A SerialPrimitiveType to represent a variable with a String datatype.

    T

    toString() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialArray
    Returns a serialized version of the respective Object.
    toString() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObject
    Returns a serialized version of the respective Object.
    toString() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialObjectVariable
    Returns a serialized version of the variable.
    toString() - Method in class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive
    Returns a serialized version of the variable.
    toString() - Method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialVariable
    Returns a serialized version of the variable.

    V

    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class me.apotterhead.cheers.vars.SerialPrimitive.SerialPrimitiveType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Version - Interface in me.apotterhead.cheers
    Verson is an interface that represents the history of a class over its lifetime, while it can be serialized and deserialized.
    versionError(String) - Static method in interface me.apotterhead.cheers.Version
    A utility method that returns a RuntimeException generated in a format consistent with other errors thrown by this library.
